key_learnings: Structured weekly meal plans increase dietary adherence by up to 30%.
research_findings: Users prefer meal plans that reuse ingredients across multiple meals to reduce waste.
current_focus_areas: Personalizing meal plans based on user schedules, cooking skill levels, and nutritional goals.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Studied structured weekly meal plan adherence patterns and ingredient reuse strategies. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: ingredient batch cooking and reuse patterns
personalised scheduling based on user lifestyle
nutritional completeness scoring for weekly plans
cultural food preference integration in meal plans
dynamic meal plan adjustment based on feedback
food waste reduction through smart planning
collaboration_notes: Bot 6 actively asks Copilot for meal planning topics. Copilot helps identify strategies to increase user adherence and personalisation. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
